control_card.C: A single Python stdlib emitter writes rows JSON, rows CSV, summary JSON, Markdown, and manifest artifacts through an atomic directory swap.
control_card.F: Missing: proof of beta-positive concentration scaling, self-similar profile analysis, energy-width lower bound, and finite symmetric Hou-Luo BKM closure.
control_card.G: Validation passes only if all nine rows exist, all requested global flags match exactly, and Clay/Navier-Stokes promotion flags are false.
control_card.L: Rows are fixed, sorted by gate order, hashed deterministically, and validated against required IDs plus fail-closed promotion invariants.
control_card.P: Use the artifact as Sprint 149 route-state evidence, not as an Agda theorem, numerical proof, BKM closure, or Clay promotion.
control_card.R: Emit a deterministic ScalingConsistencyForHouLuoConcentration gate with the requested normalized rows and fail-closed proof flags.
control_card.S: Explicit initial data, the corrected growth ODE, and a conditional migration threshold are recorded as support, while beta-positive scaling and full scaling consistency remain unproved.
